subject: [PATCH v2 3/9] nfsd: convert nfsd_net boolean flags to unsigned long flags word

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch converts the boolean flags in nfsd_net to a single unsigned long flags word, using an enum to define the bit positions. This change fixes a race condition in the grace_ended flag by using test_and_set_bit(), which is atomic on all architectures. The remaining flags are converted to use test_bit/set_bit/clear_bit for consistency and to avoid sub-word cmpxchg issues on certain architectures.
